mapper.select: select id, rule_type as ruleType, rule_value as ruleValue, description, enabled, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_security_rules where enabled = 1 order by rule_type, created_at asc
mapper.insert: insert into zephyr_security_rules (id, rule_type, rule_value, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{ruleType}, #{ruleValue}, #{description}, 1, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select id, rule_type as ruleType, rule_value as ruleValue, description, enabled, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_security_rules where rule_type = #{ruleType} order by created_at asc
